description: Allowlist for portability check skips and fallbacks

defaultBudget.description: Default budget: zero skips and fallbacks allowed unless explicitly allowlisted

skips.rationale: Integration tests create temp directories for isolation, not actual data home paths

skips.pattern: Plugin symlink check skipped for unscoped packages
skips.rationale: Unscoped workspace packages don't need symlink verification in development
uvx is not a JS/TS launcher and cannot be probed with --help
bunx is a package runner, not a direct script launcher; probing not safe
npx is a package runner, not a direct script launcher; probing not safe

fallbacks.pattern: Fallback to os.homedir() when OPENCODE_DATA_HOME and XDG_DATA_HOME not set
fallbacks.rationale: Standard fallback for non-XDG systems (Windows, macOS default)

fallbacks.pattern: Fallback to USERPROFILE on Windows when HOME not set

validationRules.rule-1: Every skip/fallback MUST have a rationale
validationRules.rule-2: Every skip/fallback MUST have an expiry date (null = permanent)
validationRules.rule-3: Expired entries MUST be removed or renewed
validationRules.rule-4: CI MUST fail if skip/fallback count exceeds budget
validationRules.rule-5: Budget violations MUST be reported in machine-readable format
